selection_filters: sufficient qfa/Alpaca real daily-bar coverage if later eligible
economic exposure to financials/regional banks/credit/small-cap cyclicals and defensives/duration

source_gate.first_vintage_requirement: Rejected because dated pages were not enough to prove timestamp-safe immutable first vintages; no fallback to current FRED/DDP was used.
source_gate.reason: Required official historical release dates/times plus vintage-safe first-vintage SLOOS component values were not fully proven from dated Federal Reserve pages. Dated SLOOS pages provide Last Update dates and parser-readable chart/table links, but no official per-survey release-time field was found; RSS/DDP timestamps found were notices/corrections rather than the needed survey release timestamps; current FRED/DDP-only history is prohibited.

universe_limitations: No ETF universe was selected because the source/vintage gate failed before qfa/Alpaca real-bar evaluation.
warnings: Do not use this scaffold for allocation; generate_signals returns zero weights.
A later attempt would need an official Federal Reserve historical release-time source or immutable archived snapshots proving first-vintage table/chart values.
